# IAEE — Premium Expired Domains & Essential Legal Documents

> Marketplace for premium expired domains (DA 28+) ideal for 301 redirects and link equity, plus ready-to-use legal document packs (Terms, Privacy, Disclaimer, Cookie Policy) for websites in 40+ languages.

IAEE (www.iaee.eu) sells two main products:
- **Premium expired domain names** with proven SEO authority, perfect for 301 redirects.
- **Essential legal document packs** (€79) for affiliate sites, photography businesses, e-commerce, nonprofits, freelancers, and more — localized in 40+ languages.

The site also publishes long-form articles on expired domains, SEO, and a worldwide VAT calculator with country guides.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of premium domains and legal document packs.
- [Premium Expired Domains](/affiliate-website-protection-essential-legal-documents-terms-conditions-privacy-policy-disclosure-cookie-policy): English marketplace landing page for premium expired domains.
- [Expired Domain Articles](/expireddomainnames/en/articles): Long-form guides on expired domains, 301 redirects, and SEO authority.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Pricing for legal document packs and domain tiers.
- [About](/about): About IAEE.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact form and support.
- [Blog](/blog): News and updates.
- [Policy](/policy): Central Terms, Privacy Policy, Disclaimer and Cookie Policy.
- [VAT Calculator](/btw-calculator-wereldwijd): Worldwide VAT calculator with country guides.

## Verticals (legal document packs)

- [Photography](/photography-legal-documents-terms-conditions-privacy-policy-contract-copyright-protection): Legal docs for photographers.
- [E-commerce](/ecommerce): Legal docs for online shops.
- [Dropshipping](/dropshipping): Legal docs for dropshipping stores.
- [Online Shop](/online-shop): Legal docs for online stores.
- [Freelancers](/freelancers): Legal docs for freelancers.
- [Nonprofit](/nonprofit): Legal docs for nonprofits.
- [E-learning](/elearning): Legal docs for course creators.
- [Travel Booking](/travel-booking): Legal docs for travel sites.
- [News & Magazine](/news-magazine): Legal docs for publishers.
- [Streaming Media](/streaming-media): Legal docs for streaming platforms.
- [Comparison & Review](/comparison-review): Legal docs for review sites.
